title: PM Siliņa takes on interim duties of Defence Minister
summary_full: Prime Minister Evika Siliņa (New Unity) signed an order on Sunday, May 10, dismissing Andris Sprūds (Progressives) from his duties as Minister of Defence, according to Cabinet Press Secretary Laura Krastiņa.
summary_public: Prime Minister Evika Siliņa (New Unity) signed an order on Sunday, May 10, dismissing Andris Sprūds (Progressives) from his duties as Minister of Defence, according to Cabinet Press Secretary Laura Krastiņa.
